projects.title: Customer Churn Prediction
projects.summary: Built a machine learning model to predict telecom customer churn using advanced feature engineering and XGBoost.
projects.problem_statement: Telecom company faced high customer churn impacting revenue.
projects.solution_approach: Performed EDA, handled imbalance using SMOTE, trained XGBoost classifier, evaluated using ROC-AUC and F1 score.

results.impact: Enabled proactive retention strategies reducing churn risk by 18%

projects.resume_bullet: Developed XGBoost churn model achieving 87% ROC-AUC and improved customer retention strategy.

projects.title: Call Center Performance Dashboard
projects.summary: Created interactive dashboard analyzing agent performance metrics.
projects.problem_statement: Management lacked visibility into SLA and AHT performance.
projects.solution_approach: Designed star schema, created DAX KPIs for AHT, FCR, SLA compliance.
projects.resume_bullet: Designed Power BI dashboard improving call center performance tracking and operational efficiency.

projects.title: Sales Forecasting Model
projects.summary: Built time-series forecasting model to predict monthly retail sales.
projects.problem_statement: Retail chain needed better inventory planning.
projects.solution_approach: Used Prophet for seasonality modeling and ARIMA for validation.
projects.resume_bullet: Developed sales forecasting model achieving 8% MAPE using Prophet.

projects.title: Credit Card Fraud Detection
projects.summary: Built fraud detection model to identify suspicious transactions.
projects.problem_statement: High financial losses due to fraudulent transactions.
projects.solution_approach: Applied Random Forest and optimized recall using precision-recall tuning.

results.impact: Reduced false negatives in high-risk transactions

projects.resume_bullet: Implemented fraud detection system achieving 94% recall using ensemble learning.

projects.title: HR Attrition Analysis
projects.summary: Analyzed employee turnover factors and presented actionable insights.
projects.solution_approach: Performed SQL analysis and visualized insights in Power BI.

results.impact: Identified overtime and salary band as major attrition factors

projects.resume_bullet: Conducted HR attrition analysis identifying key drivers of employee turnover.

projects.title: Customer Sentiment Analysis
projects.summary: Built sentiment classifier to analyze customer feedback reviews.
projects.problem_statement: Company lacked visibility into customer satisfaction trends.
projects.solution_approach: Preprocessed text data and trained sentiment classification model.

results.impact: Enabled tracking of customer satisfaction trends

projects.resume_bullet: Developed NLP-based sentiment classifier achieving 89% accuracy.

projects.title: SQL Data Warehouse Design
projects.summary: Designed star schema data warehouse for scalable reporting.
projects.problem_statement: Slow reporting queries affecting business decisions.
projects.solution_approach: Built fact and dimension tables with indexed queries.
projects.resume_bullet: Designed star-schema warehouse improving reporting performance by 35%.

projects.title: Customer Segmentation using K-Means
projects.summary: Segmented customers into behavioral groups for targeted marketing.
projects.problem_statement: Retail company lacked customer targeting strategy.
projects.solution_approach: Applied K-Means clustering and PCA visualization.
projects.resume_bullet: Applied K-Means clustering to segment customers into 4 behavioral groups.

projects.title: Real-Time Twitter Sentiment Dashboard
projects.summary: Built real-time sentiment dashboard analyzing Twitter data streams.
projects.problem_statement: Need for real-time public sentiment tracking.
projects.solution_approach: Created ETL pipeline storing tweets in SQL and visualized in Power BI.
projects.resume_bullet: Developed real-time Twitter sentiment dashboard integrating SQL and Power BI.

projects.title: Predictive Maintenance Model
projects.summary: Predicted machine failure using sensor data modeling.
projects.problem_statement: Unexpected equipment downtime caused financial losses.
projects.solution_approach: Engineered time-based features and trained Gradient Boosting model.
projects.resume_bullet: Built predictive maintenance model reducing downtime risk by 22%.
